study_group.Description: experimental group the participant belonged to

Levels.PRO/CHR: participants with psychosis or at clinical high risk for psychosis

sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

race.Description: race of the participant as reported by the participant

ethnicity.Description: ethnicity of the participant as reported by the participant

age_months.Description: age of the participant at baseline intake as in the initial session, might not be correct for other sessions

age.Description: age of the participant at baseline intake as in the initial session, might not be correct for other sessions

dx_none.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had no clinical diagnoses from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant had at least one clinical diagnosis
Levels.1: participant did not have any clinical diagnosis

dx_prodromal.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had prodromal psychosis/subthreshold psychosis spectrum disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a prodromal psychosis/subthreshold psychosis spectrum disorder
Levels.1: participant had a prodromal psychosis/subthreshold psychosis spectrum disorder

dx_prodromal_remit.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had prodromal psychosis/subthreshold psychosis spectrum disorder that is now in remission from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a prodromal psychosis/subthresdhold psychosis spectrum disorder that is now in remission
Levels.1: participant had a prodromal psychosis/subthreshold psychosis spectrum disorder that is now in remission

dx_psychosis.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had threshold psychosis spectrum disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a threshold psychosis diagnosis
Levels.1: participant had a threshold psychosis diagnosis

dx_moodnos.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had a non-specific mood disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a non-specified mood disorder diagnosis
Levels.1: participant had a non-specified mood disorder diagnosis

dx_mdd.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had major depressive disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a major depressive disorder diagnosis
Levels.1: participant had a major depressive disorder diagnosis

dx_bp.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had bipolar disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a bipolar disorder diagnosis
Levels.1: participant had a bipolar disorder diagnosis

dx_adhd.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have an Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder diagnosis
Levels.1: participant had an Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder diagnosis

dx_ptsd.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder diagnosis that is now in remission
Levels.1: participant had a Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder diagnosis that is now in remission

dx_ptsd_remit.Description: binary record of whether or not the participant had Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder that is now in remission from the clinical interview at timepoint 1

Levels.0: participant did not have a Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder diagnosis that is now in remission
Levels.1: participant had a Post-Traumatic Stres Disorder diagnosis that is now in remission
